931 ANTPSYCT_INDCTN_CD ANTPSYCT_INDCTN_CD N0415A2 High-Risk Drug (Indication): Antipsychotic CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if the resident is taking antipsychotic medication and whether there is an indication noted for all medications in the drug class.
